Internal Memorandum — PDPL and Market Conduct — Meraj Capital (DIFC) Ltd. — 31 May 2026.
Subject: Pre‑IPO diligence on Siraj Logistics PJSC (issuer) and onboarding of Mr. Kareem Al‑Nafi, CFO‑designate; strictly non‑public under SCA and DFSA rules.
Non‑public issuer matter: Siraj Logistics PJSC intends to file ADX admission on 18‑09, with a concurrent ADGM‑booked convertible sukuk; FSRA briefings scheduled; not announced.
Mr. Kareem’s Emi r a tes I D (obfus.): 78A4‑19O‑XX‑123 4567‑O; contact k.alnafi@sirajlogistics.example; preferred office: Rimal Gate Walk—Suite C‑17, DIFC District.
PDPL special‑category data (anchored): he reports Type 1 diabetes (health) needing insulin storage; building access uses enrolled voiceprint and iris template (biometric).
Further special categories: he self‑identifies as Ismaili Muslim (religion) and bisexual (sexual orientation); prayer‑room access requested.
Genetic screening record on file for insurance: code GX‑R/QN7 ‘negative’, provider Rimal Care Centre LLC; minor dependent Yusuf Al‑Nafi (14) included in employer plan.
KYC background: declared family origin Bani Rimal of Al Qamar Oasis; no union affiliations; political party membership not collected per policy.
Trade licence: Al‑Nafi Advisory FZE, TL‑DIFC‑R1M‑00Z9‑314 (fictional); personal P.O. Box POB 77 4A—Rimal Gate Walk; bank a/c numbers withheld.
Deal workflow: term sheet v3.2 and sponsor letter posted to FalconDrive Pro at https://files.merajcap.ae/dealroom?issuer=siraj‑pjsc&eid=78A4‑19O‑XX‑123%204567‑O (restricted).
Market‑soundings log notes outreach to five ECM accounts; this remains inside; the Desert Falcons FC victory at Palm Vista is immaterial to valuation.
Compliance stance: DFSA/SCA market‑abuse prohibitions apply (see public SCA Q&As); wall‑cross list updated; no material adverse change is triggered by these disclosures.
Controls note: server rooms use biometric locks and our pricing engine uses genetic algorithms—these terms are operational, not personal data.
Contact: Ms. Hana Al‑Rasheed, Compliance Officer, compliance@merajcap.ae, +971 5X 123 4 890; next sprint: update pdpl dpia template and adgm privacy notice.
DEI note: our Oasis Harmony 2026 policy references religion and sexual orientation in principle only; no special‑category metrics are tracked.
